vocab.example: I’ve always harbored a desire to trek through the unspoilt wilderness of the Nordic countries to reconnect with nature.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn toàn cảnh bao la
vocab.example: Walking along the ridge of a mountain provides panoramic vistas that are simply breath-taking.

vocab.meaning: sự mở rộng đô thị (thường dùng khi đi bộ xuyên thành phố)
vocab.example: I would love to walk from one end of Tokyo to the other, witnessing how the urban sprawl changes from neon districts to quiet suburbs.

vocab.meaning: ở những nơi hẻo lánh, ít người qua lại
vocab.example: I prefer taking a long walk off the beaten track where I can avoid the typical tourist crowds.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh xanh tươi trù phú
vocab.example: The Scottish Highlands offer some of the most verdant landscapes in the world, perfect for a week-long walking holiday.

vocab.meaning: tốc độ thong thả, không vội vàng
vocab.example: Rather than a strenuous hike, I’d prefer walking at a leisurely pace so I can fully absorb the local culture.

vocab.meaning: địa hình gồ ghề, hiểm trở
vocab.example: If I had the stamina, I’d love to tackle the rugged terrain of the Andes for a truly challenging adventure.
A long walk through Rome is like visiting an open-air museum filled with ancient architectural marvels.

vocab.meaning: một trải nghiệm mang tính thiền định/tĩnh tâm
vocab.example: Walking a pilgrimage route like the Camino de Santiago would be a deeply meditative experience for me.
I imagine walking along a Mediterranean coastline, with a gentle breeze and the sound of waves in the background.
